items.title: Malicious PyPI Package Targets LiteLLM Users in Supply Chain Attack
items.summary: Threat actors distributed a malicious version of the LiteLLM Python package via PyPI, targeting AI developers to steal credentials and API keys from developer environments.

items.title: ClickFix Campaigns Deliver AsyncRAT and Lumma Stealer Across Windows and macOS
items.summary: Social engineering campaign tricks users into executing malicious PowerShell commands via fake CAPTCHA pages, deploying multiple RATs and stealers across both major desktop platforms.

items.title: Storm-2372 Exploits OAuth Device Code Flow to Bypass MFA at Scale
items.summary: Storm-2372 leverages the OAuth device code flow phishing technique to hijack Microsoft 365 identities without triggering multi-factor authentication challenges.

items.title: Lazarus Group Deploys Updated PebbleDash Backdoor with New Lateral Movement Tools
items.summary: North Korea-linked Lazarus Group deployed updated PebbleDash backdoor variants alongside new tooling for lateral movement and long-term persistence in targeted networks.

items.title: UNC3944 Targets VMware ESXi with ALPHV Ransomware After SIM Swapping
items.summary: UNC3944 combined SIM-swapping for initial access with ALPHV ransomware deployment against ESXi hypervisors, using multi-extortion tactics against 59 confirmed victims.

items.title: 108 Chrome Extensions Linked to Data Exfiltration via Shared C2 Infrastructure
items.summary: Coordinated network of 108 browser extensions discovered sharing a common command-and-control infrastructure for bulk data exfiltration from browser sessions.
